summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI-powered features in Compass AI Governance Engine. All new AI features working correctly - Market Intelligence, Policy Analysis, Contract Analysis, and Client Onboarding Portal.

issues: LLM API calls take 30-60 seconds causing extended loading state - expected behavior due to AI processing

passed_tests: Backend: /api/ health check returns API info
Backend: /api/market-intelligence/{sector} - Returns intelligence data with regulatory_updates, compliance_trends, best_practices, risk_alerts, enforcement_actions, recommendations
Backend: /api/ai/analyze-policy - Analyzes policy documents, returns controls_addressed, controls_missing, compliance_score, gaps, recommendations
Backend: /api/ai/analyze-contract - Analyzes contracts for AI clauses, data_provisions, liability_terms, overall_risk, recommendations
Backend: /api/onboarding/submit - Creates new onboarding submissions with pending status
Backend: /api/onboarding/submissions - Lists all submissions with filter by status (pending/approved/rejected)
Backend: /api/onboarding/submissions/{id}/approve - Approves submission and creates client + AI systems
Backend: /api/onboarding/submissions/{id}/reject - Rejects submission with optional reason
Backend: /api/ai/auto-fill - Extracts client and AI system info from documents
Frontend: Navigation sidebar displays AI TOOLS section (Document Analysis, Market Intel) and ADMIN section (Onboarding)
Frontend: Document Analysis page loads with Policy/Contract type toggle, text area, model selector (GPT-5.2, Claude, Gemini), Analyze button
Frontend: Market Intelligence page loads with sector dropdown, refresh button, shows Fetching intelligence spinner
Frontend: Onboarding Admin page shows submissions list with status badges (Pending/Approved/Rejected), filter buttons, search, detail panel
Frontend: Public Onboarding page (/onboarding) shows 3-step wizard with Organization Details, AI Systems, Review & Submit
Frontend: Onboarding form has Auto-fill from Document button for AI-powered field extraction
Frontend: All form inputs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Integration: Onboarding submission flow from frontend to backend working - submissions appear in admin list
Integration: AI analysis endpoints receive requests and return LLM-generated responses
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed onboarding submissions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI-powered features (Market Intelligence, Policy Analysis, Contract Analysis, Onboarding Portal) are fully functional. AI API calls take 30-60 seconds due to LLM processing which is expected. All new pages (Document Analysis, Market Intel, Onboarding, Onboarding Admin) load correctly with proper UI components. Backend uses emergentintegrations library with GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.5, and Gemini 3 Flash models.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
